# .github/ — GitHub Configuration

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `FUNDING.yml` | Sponsor button — Buy Me a Coffee + GitHub Sponsors |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Quick-start contributing guide with links to full docs |
| `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` | PR template with checklist (build, tests, i18n, theming, a11y touch targets, aria-labels, heading hierarchy, SEO metadata, robots directives, sitemap, security) |
| `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md` | Bug report template (env, steps, screenshots) |
| `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md` | Feature request template (use case, solution, alternatives) |
| `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/security_vulnerability.md` | Security report template (responsible disclosure) |
| `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml` | Issue template chooser config (disables blank issues, adds contact links) |

## Root Community Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` | Contributor Covenant v2.1 |
| `SECURITY.md` | Security policy, reporting process, response timeline |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | Version history following Keep a Changelog format |
| `LICENSE` | MIT License |
